title: AI 2D Sticker Video (Seedance 2.0)
narration_transcript: Doesn't this look insanely cool? It was created using CDAM's 2.0 inside CapCut and I'll show you how. Open CapCut and tap on AILab to open CDAM's 2.0, upload the image and add this prompt. Now your 2D sticker video is ready. Try it yourself on CapCut now.
result_description: Turn a still image into a stylized animated '2D sticker' video using CapCut's built-in AILab (Seedance 2.0).

inputs.name: source_image
inputs.what_to_film: The still image you want to animate into a 2D sticker video.

ai_generation.prompt_strategy: author at runtime (creator's exact prompt is gated)
ai_generation.note: In CapCut: tap AILab → Seedance 2.0 → upload the image → add a prompt → generate.

success_criteria: Subject animates in the 2D sticker style
